title: Optimized RT-PCR Protocols for Whole Genome Amplification of Influenza A Virus for NGS
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"780b6","text":"This protocol describes optimized protocols for simultaneous amplification of all 8 influenza A segments using the Opti primer set with the SuperScript IV one-step RT-PCR kit or LunaScript Multiplex One-Step RT-PCR Kit. Purified amplicons can be used for NGS library preparation for influenza whole-genome sequencing.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Iryna Goraichuk
